name: Book Reader
description: Exposes a REST API for book reading apps to browse your Jellyfin book library, download book files, extract cover images, and sync reading progress across devices. Supports EPUB, PDF, MOBI, AZW3, CBZ, CBR, FB2, TXT, and DJVU. Features offline sync with conflict detection, reading session tracking, and reading streak statistics.
overview: REST API for book reading apps — browse, download, and sync progress

versions.changelog: Initial release: library browsing, file downloads, cover extraction, three-tier progress sync, batch sync, reading sessions, and statistics.
